title: TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT - 211info
text: ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING SALEM TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary-to-hire and direct-hire employment opportunities. 2290 State Street Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 16 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (971) 209-7130 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 209-7130 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID card, Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of State and 23rd Streets. Enter parking lot off of State Street. 23rd Street is exit only. Cherriots bus lines 4, 6 Services: Ex-Offender Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING SALEM
